title: Get the email address of a People field

posts.author: jdenicola (JoeD)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a People field in my board (allowing one person). In an automation, I would like to put the person’s email address in the body of an email. But when I add that field:

{pulse.person}

It put’s the person’s name. Is there any way to get that person’s email address? It doesn’t allow a mirror column of a People field.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @jdenicola,

I am afraid this isn’t currently possible. You would need to set up an email or text column in order to pull the email address into the automation - I apologise for the setback
